description: cluster.rally_weight → 1.5: Rally weight clustering is untested; increasing from 1.0 to 1.5 will amplify rally pattern dominance alongside serve weight in archetype formation, directly testing whether joint serve+rally geometry improvement can break through the persistent 0.2521 Brier plateau where 9 consecutive neutral/revert experiments suggest calibration error is locked in archetype structure rather than individual feature decay or confidence thresholds.
